texto: I was starting to see that what looks like garbage from one angle might be art from another. Maybe it did take a crisis to get to know yourself
autor: maybe you needed to get whacked hard by life before you understood what you wanted out of it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a maybe you needed to get whacked hard by life before you understood what you wanted out of it.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “I was starting to see that what looks like garbage from one angle might be art from another. Mayb…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, jodi-picoult, handle-with-care pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de handle-with-care.
